name: open-cluely-web
description: Web edition of Open-Cluely (Interviewer Copilot): React browser client + Node server reusing the desktop app's interviewer brain.

scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:qbank && npm run test:server && npm run test:web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @open-cluely/web && npm run build --workspace @open-cluely/server
